mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type, recipient_ciphertext, template_name, payload_json, status, retry_count FROM notification_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY') AND next_attempt_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ORDER BY created_at LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_outbox SET status = 'SENT', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY')

UPDATE notification_outbox SET status = #{status}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_attempt_at = #{nextAttemptAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY')
